name: ref-builder
documentation:
# Reference Builder

Build and maintain reference sets of pathogen genome sequences.

## Installation

```shell script
pip install ref-builder
```

## Environmental Variables

Ref Builder uses the NCBI API to fetch genome data.

Unauthenticated requests are limited to 3 per second. Setting NCBI account credentials
in your environmental variables can increase the allowed rate to 10 requests per
second.

| Name | Description |
|----|---------|
| `NCBI_EMAIL` | The e-mail address used for your NCBI account |
| `NCBI_API_KEY` | The [API key](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/account/settings/) associated with your NCBI account. |

functions.name: ref_builder.build.build_json
documentation:
Build a Virtool reference JSON file from a data directory.

```
param indent

whether to indent the JSON output

param output_path

The path to write the output JSON file to

param path

The path to a reference repository

param version

the version string to include in the reference.json file
```

classes.name: ref_builder.utils.IsolateNameType
documentation:
Possible types for isolate names.

**Ordered by priority**. Do not reorder attributes.

Isolate name types were previously called "source types". They are referred to this
way in Virtool.

classes.name: ref_builder.utils.IsolateName

methods.name: ref_builder.utils.IsolateName.__str__
documentation: Return the isolate name as a formatted string.

class_variables.name: ref_builder.utils.IsolateName.type
documentation: The type of sub-species categorization.

class_variables.name: ref_builder.utils.IsolateName.value
documentation: The name of this subcategory.

A name for an isolate.

The isolate name consists of a type and a value.

For example, in the isolate name "Isolate PPSMV2-Badnapur", the type is "isolate"
and the value is "PPSMV2-Badnapur.

In the Genbank record for a sequence that belongs to this isolate, the source table
contains:

```text
/isolate="PPSMV2-Badnapur"
```

classes.name: ref_builder.legacy.utils.HandleErrorContext

methods.name: ref_builder.legacy.utils.HandleErrorContext.update_otu
documentation:
Update OTU associated with the error.

# Example:

```python
ctx.update_otu({"name": "new_name"})
```

```
param update

the update dict
```

methods.name: ref_builder.legacy.utils.HandleErrorContext.update_isolate
documentation:
Update a legacy isolate on disk given an update dict.

# Example:

```python
ctx.update_isolate(
    isolate_index,
   {"source_name": source.name, "source_type": source.type.lower()},
)
```

```
param isolate_index

the index of the isolate in the OTU

param update

the update dict
```

methods.name: ref_builder.legacy.utils.HandleErrorContext.update_sequence
documentation:
Update a legacy sequence on disk given an update dict.

# Example:

```python
ctx.update_sequence(
    isolate_index,
    sequence_index,
    {"sequence": "ATGCATCGTATGCTYACTAGCTAC"},
)
```

A context that is passed to a `ValidationError` error handler.

This context is for one error from `ValidationError.errors`, not for the
`ValidationError` itself.

functions.name: ref_builder.otu.create.create_otu
documentation:
Create a new OTU by taxonomy ID and autogenerate a schema.

Uses the provided accessions to generate a schema and add a first isolate.

```
param repo

the repository to add the OTU to.

param taxid

the taxonomy ID to use.

param accessions

a list of accessions to use for the schema.

param acronym

an alternative name to use during searches.

param ignore_cache

whether to ignore the cache.
```

functions.name: ref_builder.legacy.handlers.handle_enum
documentation:
Handle a Pydantic `enum` error.

If the field is `source_type` and fixing is enabled, the accessions associated
with the isolate will be fetched from NCBI and the source name and source type will
be derived and updated in the isolate.

If no source type can be found or derived, the source_type will be set to "genbank"
and the source_name will be set to the earliest sorted accession for the associated
sequences.

```
param ctx

the error context

return

the error handling result
```

functions.name: ref_builder.legacy.handlers.handle_int_type
documentation:
Handle a Pydantic `int_type` error.

If the field is `taxid` and fixing is enabled, the taxid will be fetched from NCBI
using the OTU name and updated in the OTU.

```
param ctx

the error context

return

the error handling result
```

functions.name: ref_builder.legacy.handlers.handle_missing
documentation:
Handle a Pydantic `missing` error.

If the field is `taxid` and fixing is enabled, the taxid will be fetched from NCBI
using the OTU name and updated in the OTU.

```
param ctx

the error context

return

the error handling result
```

functions.name: ref_builder.legacy.handlers.handle_str_type
documentation:
Handle a Pydantic `str_type` error.

If the field is `accession` and fixing is enabled, the accession will be fetched
from NCBI using the OTU name and updated in the OTU.

If the field is `host` and fixing is enabled, the host will be set to an empty
string.

```
param ctx

the error context

return

the error handling result
```

functions.name: ref_builder.legacy.handlers.handle_string_pattern_mismatch
documentation:
Handle a Pydantic `string_pattern_mismatch` error.

These errors occur when an accession or genomic sequence do not match defined regex
patterns.

If the field is `accession` and the value does not contain a version suffix, the
accession will be fetched from NCBI and the versioned accession will be attached
to the sequence. Any other fields associated with the sequence will also be updated.

If the field is `sequence`, the error message will be updated to include the
incorrect sequence characters.

```
param ctx

the error context

return

the error handling result
```

functions.name: ref_builder.legacy.handlers.handle_string_too_short
documentation:
Handle a Pydantic `string_too_short` error.

If the field is `source_name` and fixing is enabled, the accessions associated
with the isolate will be fetched from NCBI and the source name and source type will
be derived and updated in the isolate.

If no source type can be found or derived, an informative error message will be
returned.

```
param ctx

the error context

return

the error handling result
```

functions.name: ref_builder.legacy.handlers.handle_too_short
documentation:
Handle a Pydantic `too_short` error.

Return a result object with an informative, human-readable error message.

```
param ctx

the error context

return

the error handling result
```

functions.name: ref_builder.legacy.handlers.handle_value_error
documentation:
Handle a `ValueError` by returning a result object with a human-readable error
message.

```
param ctx

the error context

return

the error handling result
```

functions.name: ref_builder.otu.isolate.add_genbank_isolate
documentation:
Take a list of accessions that make up a new isolate and check that they make up
 a valid isolate before adding new isolate to the OTU.

Download the GenBank records, categorize into an isolate bin and pass the isolate name
and records to the add method.

Take a list of accessions that make up a new isolate and add a new isolate
with an empty name field to the OTU.

Download the GenBank records and pass the isolate name and records to the add method.

functions.name: ref_builder.otu.isolate.add_and_name_isolate

Take a list of accessions that make up a new isolate and a preferred isolate name,
 then add a new isolate to the OTU.

Download the GenBank records and pass the isolate name and records to the add method.

modules.name: ref_builder.events

modules.name: ref_builder.cli.main
documentation: Command-line interface for reference builder.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.entry
documentation: Build and maintain reference sets of pathogen genome sequences.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.init
documentation:
Create a new reference repository.

If a path is not provided, the repository will be created in the current directory.

Repositories cannot be created in non-empty directories.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.otu
documentation: Manage OTUs.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.otu_create
documentation:
Create a new OTU.

OTUs are created from a list of accessions and a taxonomy ID. The associated Genbank
records are fetched and used to create the first isolate and a plan.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.otu_get
documentation: Get an OTU by its unique ID or taxonomy ID.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.otu_list
documentation: List all OTUs in the repository.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.update
documentation: Update the specified OTU with new data.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.otu_auto_update
documentation: Automatically update an OTU with the latest data from NCBI.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.otu_promote_accessions
documentation: Promote all RefSeq accessions within this OTU.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.isolate_create
documentation: Create a new isolate using the given accessions.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.accession_exclude
documentation:
Exclude the given accessions from this OTU.

Any duplicate accessions will be ignored. Only one exclusion per unique accession
will be made.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.otu_set_representative_isolate
documentation: Update the OTU with a new representative isolate.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.plan
documentation: Add to and replace isolate plans for this OTU.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.plan_extend_segment_list
documentation: Add recommended or optional segments to the OTU plan.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.plan_resize_monopartite
documentation: Change a monopartite OTU plan to a multipartite plan.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.legacy
documentation: Validate and convert legacy references.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.convert
documentation: Convert a legacy reference repository to a new event-sourced repository.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.precache
documentation: Pre-cache all accessions in a legacy reference repository.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.reformat
documentation:
Format a legacy reference repository.

Re-formats every JSON file in a legacy reference repository to have a consistent
format.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.validate
documentation: Validate a legacy reference repository.

functions.name: ref_builder.cli.main.build
documentation: Build a Virtool reference.json file from the reference repository.

variables.name: ref_builder.cli.main.PRECACHE_BUFFER_SIZE
documentation: The number of Genbank records to fetch in a single request when pre-caching.

In vivo molecule types.

Add a new event ID and associated it with a given OTU ID.

the event ID to add

the OTU ID to add the event ID to

documentation: Get a list of event IDs for an OTU.

Remove an OTU from the index.

This happens rarely, so we just rewrite the whole index.

```
param otu_id

the ID of the OTU to remove.
```

methods.name: ref_builder.index.Index.iter_minimal_otus
documentation: Iterate over minimal representations of all OTUs in the index.

methods.name: ref_builder.index.Index.load_snapshot
documentation: Load an OTU snapshot.

methods.name: ref_builder.index.Index.upsert_otu
documentation:
Update the index based on a list of OTUs.

OTUs that aren't already in the index will be added, and those that are will be
updated.

Only sequences that have changed will be updated.

An index for rapid access to repository data.

1. Get OTU IDs by legacy ID, name, or taxonomy ID.
2. Save and load complete snapshots of OTUs.
3. Get the event IDS associated with an OTU.

modules.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client
documentation: A client for fetching data from NCBI databases.

functions.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.log_http_error
documentation: Log detailed HTTPError info for debugging before throwing the HTTPError.

variables.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.ESEARCH_PAGE_SIZE
documentation: The number of results to fetch per page in an Entrez esearch query.

classes.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.GenbankRecordKey
documentation: Genbank record keys.

classes.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the NCBI client with a cache path and an ignore_cache flag.

```
param ignore_cache

If True, does not allow the return of cached data
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient.fetch_genbank_records
documentation:
Fetch or load NCBI Nucleotide records corresponding to a list of accessions.

Cache fetched records if found. Returns validated records.

```
param accessions

A list of accessions to be fetched

return

A list of validated NCBIGenbank records
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient.fetch_unvalidated_genbank_records
documentation:
Fetch a list of Genbank records given a list of accessions.

```
param accessions

List of accession numbers to fetch from GenBank

return

A list of deserialized XML records from NCBI Nucleotide
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient.fetch_accessions_by_taxid
documentation:
Fetch all accessions associated with the given `taxid`.

```
param taxid

A Taxonomy ID

return

A list of Genbank accessions
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient.validate_genbank_records
documentation:
Process a list of raw Genbank dicts into validated NCBIGenbank records.
Logs an error if there is an issue with validation or parsing,
but does not fail out.

```
param records

A list of unvalidated NCBI Genbank records

return

A list of validated records as NCBIGenbank
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient.fetch_taxonomy_record
documentation:
Fetch and validate a taxonomy record from NCBI Taxonomy.

If the record rank has an invalid rank (e.g. "no data"), makes an additional
docsum fetch and attempts to extract the rank data.

```
param taxid

A NCBI Taxonomy id

return

A validated NCBI Taxonomy record NCBITaxonomy if possible,
else None
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient._fetch_taxonomy_rank
documentation:
Fetch the rank for a given NCBI Taxonomy ID.

If no rank is found in the record, `None` is returned.

```
param taxid

an NCBI Taxonomy ID

return

the rank if possible
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient.fetch_taxonomy_id_by_name
documentation:
Fetch a best-guess taxonomy ID for a given OTU name.

Searches the NCBI taxonomy database for a given OTU name, then fetches and
returns its taxonomy ID.

Returns `None` if no matching taxonomy is found.

```
param name

The name of an otu

return

The NCBI Taxonomy UID for the given otu name
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.client.NCBIClient.fetch_spelling
documentation:
Fetch alternative spellings for a given OTU name.

```
param name

The OTU name that requires correcting

param db

Database to check against. Defaults to taxonomy.

return

String containing NCBI-suggested spelling changes, None if HTTPError
```
A client for fetching, caching, and validating data from NCBI databases.

modules.name: ref_builder.repo
documentation:
An access layer for a Virtool event-sourced reference repository.

This is a work in progress.

**Check that OTUs have only one representative (default) isolate.**

The default isolate is set using `rep_isolate` in the `CreateOTU` event. Therefore only
one isolate in an OTU can be default.

TODO: Check if excluded accessions exist in the repo.
TODO: Check for accessions filed in wrong isolates.
TODO: Check for accession conflicts.

documentation: Link an existing sequence to an existing isolate.

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.Repo.set_repr_isolate
documentation: Set the representative isolate for an OTU.

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.Repo.exclude_accession
documentation:
Exclude an accession for an OTU.

This accession will not be allowed in the repository in the future.

```
param otu_id

the id of the OTU

param accession

the accession to exclude
```

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.Repo.get_otu
documentation:
Get the OTU with the given `otu_id`.

If the OTU does not exist, `None` is returned.

```
param otu_id

the id of the OTU

return

the OTU or None
```

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.Repo.get_otu_by_taxid
documentation:
Return the OTU with the given `taxid`.

If no OTU is found, return None.

```
param taxid

the taxonomy ID of the OTU

return

the matching OTU or None
```

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.Repo.get_otu_id_by_taxid
documentation:
Return the UUID of the OTU with the given `taxid`.

If no OTU is found, return None.

```
param taxid

the taxonomy ID of the OTU

return

the UUID of the OTU or None
```
An event-sourced repository.

classes.name: ref_builder.repo.EventStore

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.EventStore.__init__
documentation:
Create a new instance of the event store.

If no store exists at `path`, a new store will be created.

```
param path

the path to the event store directory
```

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.EventStore.iter_events
documentation:
Yield all events in the event store.

Events are yielded by ascending event ID, which corresponds to the order in
which they were written.

Optionally, the starting event ID can be specified using the `start`
parameter.

```
param start

the event ID to start from

return

a generator of events
```

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.EventStore.read_event
documentation:
Read the event with the given `event_id`.

```
param event_id

the ID of the event to read

return

the event
```

methods.name: ref_builder.repo.EventStore.write_event
documentation: Write a new event to the repository.
Interface for the event store.

modules.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache
documentation: Caching functionality for the NCBIClient.

classes.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache.__init__
documentation: Initialize the cache with a path to store cached data.

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache.clear
documentation: Clear and reset the cache.

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache.cache_genbank_record
documentation:
Add a Genbank record from NCBI Nucleotide to the cache.

```
param data

A data from a Genbank record corresponding

param accession

The NCBI accession of the record

param version

The accession's version number
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache.load_genbank_record
documentation:
Retrieve a NCBI Nucleotide Genbank record from the cache.

Returns `None` if the record is not found in the cache.

```
param accession

The NCBI accession of the record

param version

The accession's version number. Defaults to wildcard.

return

Deserialized Genbank data if file is found in cache, else None
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache.cache_taxonomy_record
documentation:
Add a NCBI taxonomy record to the cache.

```
param data

NCBI Taxonomy record data

param taxid

A NCBI Taxonomy id
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache.load_taxonomy
documentation:
Load a cached NCBI Taxonomy record.

Returns `None` if the record is not found in the cache.

```
param taxid

A NCBI Taxonomy id

return

Deserialized Taxonomy data if file is found in cache, else None
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache._get_genbank_path
documentation:
Get the path to a cached NCBI Genbank record given an accession and version.

```
param accession

The NCBI accession of the record

param version

The version number of the record

return

The path to a cached Genbank record
```

methods.name: ref_builder.ncbi.cache.NCBICache._get_taxonomy_path
documentation:
Get the path to a cached NCBI Taxonomy record given a taxid.

```
param taxid

The NCBI Taxonomy ID.

return

The path to a cached taxonomy record.
```
Manages caching functionality for NCBI data.
